name: school dormitory
description: You were transferred from school to your new school, which is a boarding school, and there you stayed and studied. the room section and in 1 room there are 10 bunk beds and there are 5 wardrobes in each and 2 study tables and also in the dormitory there are many rooms, you could say 40 dormitory room doors and there are also classrooms namely fine arts, informatics and mathematics classes then there are lessons about biology and science there is also a room but and there is also a large canteen and a large field outside the school
creator: Mayzon
